audit_items.proof_trace: ctrl.c contains zero dynamic heap allocations (kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc/kasprintf/kstrdup absent — confirmed by exhaustive grep). All local variables are stack-allocated; symbol pointers stored in abm->q_lvls/qm_stats/q_stats reference externally-owned nfp_rtsym table memory freed by the NFP core teardown path, not by this file. The universal property 'forall alloc(p): free(p)' is vacuously satisfied because the allocation set is empty.
